"C:\Users\yeims\New folder (2)\CLion 2024.3.1.1\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\openglstuff.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\openglstuff.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\openglstuff.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\openglstuff.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o openglstuff.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libopenglstuff.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\openglstuff.dir\linkLibs.rsp
